title: Short title
doc_html:
PART V. COMMUNITY-BASED CARE FACILITIES

NOTE: §2162.1 as enacted by Acts 2017, No. 417, §1. Section 2 of that act provides: "Implementation of the provisions of this Act shall only become effective in the event a specific appropriation by the legislature is made for such purposes and the program receives approval by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services."

§2162.1. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the "Community-Based Care Facility Licensing Law".

            Acts 2017, No. 417, §1.
doc_text:
PART V.  COMMUNITY-BASED CARE FACILITIES
NOTE: §2162.1 as enacted by Acts 2017, No. 417, §1.  Section 2 of that act
provides:  "Implementation of the provisions of this Act shall only become
effective in the event a specific appropriation by the legislature is made for
such purposes and the program receives approval by the Centers for Medicare
and Medicaid Services."
§2162.1.  Short title
This Part may be cited as the "Community-Based Care Facility Licensing Law".
Acts 2017, No. 417, §1.
